scope.notes: The contract path /api/v1/aura-cards/generate and the user-requested alias /api/v1/generations/start share the same DB-backed generation service. No AI key was present or used; fallback evidence is deterministic mock/local.

commands.evidence: Wrote API transcript, mock transcript, and DB readback evidence. Covered validation failure, missing draw session, mock fallback generation, idempotency, /generations/start alias, job success readback, and job not found.
No secret-like literals or forbidden Web P0 copy found in apps/web/server, apps/web/app/api, or apps/web/tests/api. T06 secret-scan evidence was also written.
tsc --noEmit passed after replacing self-referential repository types and making Prisma JSON input explicit.
Next production build compiled /api/v1/aura-cards/generate, /api/v1/generations/start, and /api/v1/generation-jobs/[jobId] as dynamic Route Handlers.
Default API runner still executes foundation coverage after updating the T04 hard-coded script assertion.

evidence.summary: 7 transcript cases across API-005/API-006, including mock fallback success and idempotent repeat.
No AI key used; provider mock-fallback-forced generated a complete structured Aura Card.
Readback counts: GenerationJob=2, AuraCard=2; each job resultCardId matches a persisted AuraCard.
No API keys, bearer tokens, or secret-like literals detected in the T06 API/server/test scan roots.
Build listed all new T06 routes as dynamic handlers.

rerunResumeState.notes: T06 test prepares a local SQLite schema with prisma db push before resetting data. A real OpenAI-compatible call is gated behind AURACUE_AI_PROVIDER=openai and an API key; no live provider proof was attempted in this worker.

exitCondition: T09/T13 can create or poll a locally generated result card through API-005/API-006 with persisted GenerationJob/AuraCard readback.
